title: Marketing Specialist (DACH)
required_skills: Content development (newsletters, case studies, articles, testimonials, sales collateral)
Social media and digital content (DACH market)
Event management (trade shows, customer events, partner activities)
bonus_skills: Experience in renewable energy, high-tech, power electronics, or EV industries
matched_skills: GTM strategy and product launch execution (lead-generation, strategic thinking)
2+ years product marketing experience (Futu Holdings + Leyard Europe)
C-level reporting and competitive analysis (written/verbal communication)
Leyard Europe high-tech industry background (partial bonus match)
missing_skills: Full professional proficiency in German (Boru is B2 — below the required C1/C2 level; flag in cover letter or interviews)
Advertising and media planning (no explicit experience listed)
Regional marketing budget management and ROI tracking
Marketing asset and artwork production coordination
core_responsibilities: Plan and execute quarterly lead-generation campaigns to increase pipeline and drive revenue growth
Lead content development across newsletters, case studies, articles, testimonials, and sales presentations
Manage advertising, media planning, and DACH-localized social and digital content
Oversee planning and execution of trade shows, customer events, and partner activities
Manage regional marketing budget, coordinate marketing assets, and organize customer training programs and webinars
recommended_emphasis: Highlight GTM campaign experience (Futu Holdings, Leyard Europe) as direct evidence of lead-generation and pipeline-building capability
Emphasize trade fair presentation and event coordination experience at Leyard Europe (EMEA scope)
Showcase sales enablement collateral and content development work as proof of content development skills
Stress HubSpot and Google Analytics proficiency to demonstrate digital marketing readiness
Address German language level proactively: frame B2 as near-professional, mention ongoing improvement, and highlight strong written German in any application materials
Leverage Leyard Europe high-tech/B2B background as closest proxy for renewable energy/clean-tech industry experience
Quantify ROI, budget, or campaign reach metrics from previous roles to partially address budget management gap
